creator: vassilis.laganakos@yahoo.com
text:
ksysguardd's dist info contains the wrong sha256 hash for kdebase-workspace-4.6.5.tar.bz2. If you try to build the port from source, because of the hash mismatch for the source tarball, the build will fail.

Fix: Update the distinfo contents with the correct SAH256 and SIZE values. Apply attached patch.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Enter:
	/usr/ports/sysutils/ksysguardd

and do "make".  This will give you:

===>  License check disabled, port has not defined LICENSE
===>  Extracting for ksysguardd-4.6.5
=> SHA256 Checksum mismatch for KDE/kdebase-workspace-4.6.5.tar.bz2.
===>  Refetch for 1 more times files: KDE/kdebase-workspace-4.6.5.tar.bz2 
===>  License check disabled, port has not defined LICENSE
=> kdebase-workspace-4.6.5.tar.bz2 doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/KDE.
=> Attempting to fetch http://mirrors.isc.org/pub/kde/stable/4.6.5/src//kdebase-workspace-4.6.5.tar.bz2
